claim_limits: The validated denominator contains planted fixtures, not a representative real-driver sample.
Policy-dependent discovery rows remain unlabeled until source and machine validation.
Five deterministic settings do not enumerate all satisfying models.
Policy-dependent solve work and process time are descriptive integration costs, not solver-speed cells.
BoundarySet and DiverseEnum remain unmeasured until bounded set forking is executable; symbolic memory remains conditional.

tcpip-discovery.classification: unlabeled discovery output; not recall ground truth

preregistered_acceptance.authority_parity: Every cell must have stable, exact high-confidence finding parity between sole Z3 and sole Axeyum authority.
preregistered_acceptance.discovery: No direction or magnitude of tcpip policy variation is an acceptance gate. Raw, high-confidence, and diagnostic populations are retained verbatim and remain unlabeled until independently validated.
preregistered_acceptance.positive_control: Every policy/backend cell must reproduce all 14 independently validated findings with zero false negatives and zero unexpected high-confidence rows.
preregistered_acceptance.source_and_binary_identity: Every source tree, authority binary, manifest, and driver hash must match exactly and remain clean/stable.
preregistered_acceptance.work: Repetitions, order, environment, coverage boundary, solve counts, and policy telemetry must pass the fail-closed analyzer.

preregistered_claim_limits: The positive control is a planted regression denominator, not representative real-driver recall or prevalence.
Tcpip is an unlabeled discovery population and does not establish true or false positives without separate source and machine validation.
Complete usbprint failed the v1 policy-resource boundary and is excluded transparently, not counted as a zero or successful cell.
The campaign measures integration work and cost descriptively; it is not a solver-speed comparison.
BoundarySet and DiverseEnum are not executable at 7f682e5 and are excluded rather than approximated by a single boundary choice.
Symbolic or symcrete memory is memory-model work and remains gated on a measured validated coverage gap after the policy sweep.
